name: Gemechis Worku
headline: Production AI & data systems for regulated, high-scale domains.
subheadline: Strategic software engineer and data scientist with 4+ years of expertise in AI-driven automation, large-scale FinTech integrations, and full-stack architecture. Proven delivery of LLM-powered workflows, enterprise-grade payment infrastructure (FIS), and scalable data pipelines on GCP and BigQuery — aligning technical systems with business outcomes in banking and logistics.
